name: Israel
startIntroPart2: play as the holy nation blessed by God, From biblical Israel to the modern day
declaringWar: The time for war has come
attacked: You shall face the wrath of god!
defeated: You may have won but she shall outlive you
introduction: As superior galactic entities, you are not worthy of our attention.
hateNo: That is not going to happen!
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.
uniques: Units ignore terrain costs when moving into any tile with Hills
No Maintenance costs for improvements in [Hill] tiles
May choose [1] additional belief(s) of any type when [founding] a religion
May choose [1] additional belief(s) of any type when [enhancing] a religion

name: Aliens
startIntroPart2: This is an overpowered joke nation just as an example for the mods feature. Set Phasers to Obliterate!!
declaringWar: Resistance is futile! Prepare to be assimilated!
attacked: You want to play? Very funny!
defeated: How is it possible that those Apes hurt us? The galactic senate will take care of them.
introduction: As superior galactic entities, you are not worthy of our attention.
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Very well, all that fighting was getting boring anyway.
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.

name: Republic of Texas
startIntroPart1: President Sam Houston rules the new young nation known as the Republic of Texas
startIntroPart2: President Sam Housto, will you show to the world greatness of your state, to be remembered annuls of of history?
declaringWar: Your wanton aggression leaves us no choice. Prepare for war!
attacked: You have mistaken our kindess for weakness. You shall come regret this!
defeated: Today you triumph but someday others with do the same to you.
introduction: The people of the great Republic of Texas welcome you.
tradeRequest: Is the following trade of interest to you?
uniques: [-50]% Gold cost of acquiring tiles [in all cities]

name: Magic Empire
startIntroPart2: Can the power of magic conqurer all
declaringWar: We want the blood of your soldiers!
attacked: Oh well, I presume you know what you're getting yourself into?
defeated: We shall be waiting for you in the afterlife. You won't be so lucky there
tradeRequest: It appears that you do have a reason for existing – and its to make this deal with us.

name: British Empire
startIntroPart1: Long live to Your Highness, Queen Victoria, leader and protector of the glorious British Empire! Through history, enduring many invasions, England strengthened its will, playing smartly with diplomacy, cunning, and military power, to eventually rose as one of the most dominant Empires the world has ever known. Their matchless navy, brilliant scientists and artists, and powerful merchants, have shaped the known world for centuries.
startIntroPart2: Queen Victoria, will the British Empire cast its brightness upon all lands and seas of the world? Will your new empire shine through the ages of history?
declaringWar: By the grace of God, your days are numbered.
defeated: You have triumphed over us. The day is yours.
denounced: Your reckless pride will destroy you if you're not careful.
introduction: We are pleased to meet you.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement with England?
uniques: [-50]% Gold cost of acquiring tiles [in all cities]
[+20]% Production when constructing [All] wonders [in all cities]
City-State territory always counts as friendly territory
[+100 Gold] for discovering a Natural Wonder (bonus enhanced to [+500 Gold] if first to discover it)
[+1 Happiness] for every known Natural Wonder
Enables embarkation for land units <starting from the [Ancient era]> <Suppress warning [*contains a conditional on a unit movement unique*]>
Enables [All] units to enter ocean tiles <starting from the [Ancient era]>

name: Nicho Clans
startIntroPart1: O Khorvir the great, your people are no longer devided. The clans welcome you! May your magnificence continue to unite all our people annd let our forces dominate the worlds discorse!
startIntroPart2: O mighty Khorvir, do you hear the call of your people? seeking for revenge? Will you lead them to victory under the light of the Five Suns? Will your new empire shine through the ages of history?
declaringWar: By the grace of God, your days are numbered.
defeated: You have triumphed over us. The day is yours.
denounced: Your reckless pride will destroy you if you're not careful.
introduction: We are pleased to meet you.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement with England?
uniques: No Maintenance costs for improvements in [Snow] tiles
[+1 Food, +3 Production, +1 Happiness] from every [{non-[Natural Wonder]} {Mountain}]

name: European Union
startIntroPart1: The emergency situation has lead to the council has taken over the EU as a whole. It is your job as a memeber of the Council to save the union from the threats comming its way
startIntroPart2: Council it is time to shine
declaringWar: We are sick of your pressence!
attacked: Doom is the only payment awaying one as foolish as you!
defeated: You Monster! Seek to destroy our greatness?
introduction: What do we see before us? Outsiders from an unkown clan?
defeated: This union has ended, has ended, has ended, but one day! A new union! Will rise! And replace you!
introduction: Hello, Hello, Hello, Hello, Hello. We are the, EUROPAN! Union, and we, ARE THE COUNCIL! whose tasked with, its govvernance. Are you? Interested in joining! our ranks?
tradeRequest: We! Have an! Offer! For you.
uniques: When conquering an encampment, earn [25] Gold and recruit a Barbarian unit <with [67]% chance>
City-State territory always counts as friendly territory
Can spend Gold to annex or puppet a City-State that has been your Ally for [5] turns
Retain [50]% of the happiness from a luxury after the last copy has been traded away
[+100 Gold] for discovering a Natural Wonder (bonus enhanced to [+500 Gold] if first to discover it)
[+1 Happiness] for every known Natural Wonder
